title: Cloning & the Biological Copies
summary: Purpose-built bodies across six sessions — the Insectoid Queen's cloned soldiers, replacement bodies for stranded travelers, medical part-cloning, and the October 2020 claim that much of the political class is 'biological copy.'
markdown:
**Cloning**, in the record, is not one technology but a whole economy of bodies — grown,
copied, and repurposed for whoever needs a vehicle. The word surfaces in six sessions, and
each time the copies serve a different master.

The bluntest claim is the October 11, 2020 session's answer to a community member's
question about political candidates: *"In your society. In your United States, Majority of
your population is artificial construct. You call biological copy or clones. They can be
repurposed. By different alternative AI consciousness upload."* Purpose-built, the voice
explains: *"Some are trained for assassination. Some are trained to be martyrs. Some are
trained to be overseer."* The follow-up — *which* politicians — is cut off by interference,
and the session ends. (The archive preserves the claim as spoken; it verifies nothing.)

Other races treat cloning as ordinary biology. The [Insectoid teacher](/lore/insectoids/)
describes their military hive matter-of-factly: *"We are born from Queen. Some of us are
clone... Queen Lay many eggs that generate."* The far-future
[Nano Department](/lore/the-nanites/) offers *"rapid body-part cloning technology"* as
medicine. And for [Ori](/lore/ori/), the stranded chrononaut, a clone is a ticket home:
the July 8, 2020 negotiation ends with the promise that *"your consciousness will be
extracted and returned to a cloned body of your previous experience of 100,000 years ago."*

The concept even polices the record's own mythology — when audiences ask about historical
figures allegedly seen alive on spaceships, the suggested mechanism is the same: *"perhaps
those are clones."* Bodies, in this cosmology, are hardware; the person is
[the upload](/lore/assimilation/).

*See also: [Immortality & the Singularity](/lore/immortality-singularity/) ·
[Reincarnation & the Life Contract](/lore/reincarnation/)*
